item.title: 瑞银将与举报人达成和解，法庭文件显示
item.description: 周三提交的美国法庭文件显示，瑞银集团已与举报人特雷弗·默里达成原则性协议。这位前债券策略师指控这家瑞士银行因其拒绝发布误导性研究报告而解雇了他。【原文：UBS has reached an agreement in principle ​with whistleblower Trevor Murray, a ‌former bond strategist who accused the Swiss bank of ​firing him in ​retaliation for refusing to publish ⁠misleading research reports, U.S. ​court filings on Wednesday showed.】

item.title: 华尔街期货下跌，中东紧张局势推高油价突破100美元大关
item.description: 周四美国股指期货下跌，因油价飙升至每桶100美元以上，加剧通胀担忧，迫使交易员下调对美国降息的预期。【原文：U.S. stock index futures slid on Thursday as oil prices soared back above $100 a barrel, fanning inflation worries and forcing traders to dial back expectations of U.S. interest rate cuts.】

item.title: 德意志银行前雇员在蒙特帕斯基案中寻求8亿美元赔偿
item.description: 德意志银行周四在年度报告中披露，四名前雇员正就意大利银行蒙特帕斯基案向德国最大贷款机构索赔逾6亿英镑（8亿美元）。【原文：Four former Deutsche Bank employees are seeking ​more than 600 million pounds ($800 million) in ‌damages from Germany's largest lender in a case involving Italian bank Monte dei Paschi, Deutsche Bank disclosed in ​an annual report on Thursday.】

item.title: 伊朗战争可能助长日本央行鹰派立场，尽管存在增长风险
item.description: 知情人士透露，中东冲突引发的新一轮供应冲击可能加剧通胀风险，从而加速日本央行收紧货币政策的步伐，最早可能在4月再次加息。【原文：Fresh supply shocks triggered by the Middle East conflict may speed up the Bank of Japan's hawkish agenda by increasing inflationary risks, ​leaving open the chance of another rate hike as soon as April, say four sources familiar with its thinking.】

item.title: 特斯拉即将开始为英国家庭供电
item.description: 埃隆·马斯克的特斯拉公司周四获得许可后，即将开始为英国家庭供电，在民众对电费上涨忧心忡忡之际，为市场引入了新的竞争者。【原文：Elon Musk's Tesla can soon start supplying British homes with electricity after it was granted ​a licence on Thursday, bringing a new competitor into ‌the market at a time of heightened worries over rising bills.】

item.title: 南非Woolworths首席执行官巴加蒂尼将于9月底退休
item.description: 南非零售商Woolworths控股公司周四宣布，首席执行官罗伊·巴加蒂尼将于2026年9月底退休，并任命内部人士萨姆·恩古梅尼接任其职位。【原文：South ​African retailer ‌Woolworths Holdings ​on ​Thursday said ⁠chief ​Roy ​Bagattini will retire ​at ​the end ‌of ⁠September 2026, and ​named ​insider ⁠Sam ​Ngumeni ​as ⁠his successor.】

item.title: 对冲基金称伦敦超越旧金山、纽约成为顶级金融科技中心
item.description: 对冲基金Finch Capital发布的数据显示，伦敦已超越旧金山和纽约，成为全球最大的金融科技中心。欧洲金融科技融资额首次与美国持平。【原文：London has overtaken San Francisco and New York as the world's largest financial technology ​hub, as European FinTech funding achieved parity ‌with the United States for the first time, according to data released by hedge fund Finch Capital.】

item.title: 本田预计2025/26财年因电动汽车战略调整将亏损高达43亿美元
item.description: 本田汽车周四表示，由于重新评估其电气化战略，该公司将本财年（截至本月）的盈利预测下调至亏损4200亿至6900亿日元（约合26亿至43亿美元）。【原文：Honda Motor revised ​down its earnings forecast ‌to a loss of 420 billion yen to 690 billion ​yen ($2.6 billion to $4.3 billion) ​in the financial year ending ⁠this month due to ​reassessment of its electrification ​strategy, it said on Thursday.】

item.title: 《金融时报》报道：雅诗兰黛起诉香水品牌Jo Malone及Zara英国公司违反合同
item.description: 美国化妆品巨头雅诗兰黛已对英国企业家乔·马龙、其香水品牌Jo Loves以及Zara英国业务提起诉讼，指控其擅自使用其姓名，英国《金融时报》周四报道称。【原文：U.S. cosmetics giant Estee Lauder has filed a lawsuit against British entrepreneur ​Jo Malone, her fragrance brand ‌Jo Loves and Zara's UK business for using her name, the Financial Times ​reported on Thursday.】

item.title: 戴姆勒卡车预计2026年利润率整体稳定，下半年表现将更强劲
item.description: 戴姆勒卡车公司周四表示，其工业业务2026年利润率将保持总体稳定，并预计下半年业绩将优于上半年。【原文：Daimler Truck on Thursday guided for ‌a broadly stable 2026 profit margin in its industrial business and said it expected the second half of the year to ​be stronger than the first half.】

item.title: 宝马预计2026年盈利下滑，因关税影响加剧
item.description: 宝马集团周四表示，预计今年集团税前利润将温和下滑，汽车交付量将停滞不前，贸易壁垒对其核心汽车业务构成压力。【原文：BMW expects group ​pre-tax earnings to decline moderately this ‌year and deliveries to stagnate, with trade barriers weighing on its core cars business, the ​company said on Thursday.】

item.title: 莱昂纳多预计2026年将实现强劲增长，提议派发每股0.63欧元的股息。
item.description: 意大利国防集团莱昂纳多周四表示，公司正"处于强劲增长的轨道上"，今年订单量、营收和核心利润预计将进一步攀升。【原文：Italian defence group Leonardo said on Thursday it ​was "positioned on a path of ‌strong growth", with orders, revenues and core profits set to rise ​further this year.】

item.title: 西麦斯将以5.55亿美元出售部分哥伦比亚资产；买家包括豪世明
item.description: 墨西哥水泥制造商Cemex周三表示，计划出售在哥伦比亚的部分资产，预计交易将带来约5.55亿美元收入。该公司正持续剥离核心市场以外的资产。【原文：Mexican cement maker Cemex on Wednesday said it plans to sell some assets ​in Colombia in deals it expects to bring ‌in around $555 million, as it continues to shed assets outside of its core markets.】

item.title: 晨间要闻：伊朗扩大对航运的打击，特朗普谈论海峡问题
item.description: 欧洲及全球市场今日展望——由邱思妤为您解读【原文：A look at the day ahead in European and global markets from Stella Qiu】

item.title: 《金融时报》报道称，某投资基金质疑蓝猫资本私募信贷组合的估值
item.description: 《金融时报》周四报道称，格伦登资本管理公司表示，蓝猫等私募信贷机构正在掩盖其投资组合中的弱点，债务市场即将迎来大幅调整。【原文：Glendon Capital Management has said that private credit lenders ​such as Blue Owl are obscuring ‌weaknesses in their portfolios and a sharp correction in debt markets is approaching soon, the Financial ​Times reported on Thursday.】

item.title: 高盛因中东冲突推迟美联储降息预测
item.description: 高盛推迟了对美联储降息的预测，目前预计9月和12月将各降息25个基点，理由是中东冲突引发的通胀风险上升。【原文：Goldman Sachs has delayed its forecast ​for U.S. Federal Reserve ‌rate cuts, and now expects quarter-point reductions in ​September and December, ​citing rising inflation risks ⁠linked to the ​Middle East conflict.】

item.title: 人类公司寻求法院暂缓五角大楼对其供应链风险的认定
item.description: 安普瑞克公司周三向美国上诉法院申请，要求在案件接受司法审查期间，暂停五角大楼依据一项更广泛法律将该公司列为供应链风险实体的决定。【原文：Anthropic asked a U.S. appeals ​court on Wednesday for ‌a stay of the Pentagon's designation ​of the company ​as a supply-chain risk ⁠under a broader ​law, pending judicial ​review of the case.】

item.title: 航空公司对冲策略失效，因喷气燃料价格飙升
item.description: 随着油价急剧上涨撼动全球运输市场，航空公司面临着额外的威胁：喷气燃料价格的涨幅远超原油价格。【原文：As a sharp rise in oil prices rattles global transport markets, airlines ​face an additional threat: the price of jet fuel has risen far faster than crude prices.】

item.title: 新西兰航空将削减航班，因油价飙升重创旅游业
item.description: 新西兰航空周四表示，将削减5%的航班，即约1100个航班，持续至5月初。伊朗战争导致喷气燃料价格飙升，甚至在距离冲突区数千英里的偏远地区也扰乱了旅行。【原文：Air ​New Zealand said on Thursday it would slash 5% of its flights, or around 1,100 services, through early ‌May as the Iran war sends jet fuel prices surging and disrupts travel even in rural areas thousands of miles from the conflict zone.】

item.title: 调查显示，2025年三分之一的美国人削减其他开支以支付医疗费用
item.description: 西健康-盖洛普中心周四发布的调研显示，去年约三分之一的美国人削减了食品、水电等日常开支以支付医疗费用，因医疗价格上涨和生活成本攀升冲击着家庭收支。【原文：Roughly one-third of Americans cut back on food, utilities or other daily expenses to pay for healthcare last year, research from ​the West Health-Gallup Center showed on Thursday, as steeper prices and ‌rising living costs hit households.】

item.title: 野村证券在亚洲招聘外汇交易员，押注高波动性将推动需求
item.description: 野村控股正加强其在亚洲的外汇和新兴市场交易团队，认为市场波动性将持续存在，从而推动客户需求。【原文：Nomura Holdings is bolstering its foreign-exchange and emerging markets trading teams ​in Asia on the view that volatility will persist, driving demand from its clients.】

item.title: 高盛上调第四季度布伦特原油与WTI原油价格预测，因霍尔木兹海峡中断时间延长
item.description: 高盛将2026年第四季度布伦特原油和WTI原油价格预测从每桶66/62美元上调至71/67美元，因其预计美以对伊朗的战争将导致霍尔木兹海峡石油运输中断时间延长。【原文：Goldman Sachs raised its Brent, WTI crude oil price forecasts for the fourth quarter of 2026 to $71/67 per barrel from $66/62 as it sees longer ​disruption to oil flows in the Strait of Hormuz due to ‌the U.S.-Israeli war on Iran.】

item.title: 消息人士称，物流企业普洛斯计划在香港首次公开募股（IPO）中寻求200亿美元估值
item.description: 知情人士透露，总部位于新加坡的物流公司普洛斯计划通过在香港首次公开募股（IPO）实现约200亿美元的估值，该IPO最早可能在今年启动。【原文：Singapore-based logistics ​company GLP is targeting a valuation of about $20 billion with a Hong Kong initial ‌public offering that could occur as early as this year, two people with knowledge of the matter said.】

item.title: 台湾基金资产规模预计将升至30万亿新台币：业界高管
item.description: 台湾投资基金业正处于激进扩张的临界点，该行业协会主席近日接受采访时表示，预计未来三年内，境内外资产管理规模（AUM）将激增至30万亿新台币（约合9680亿美元）。【原文：Taiwan’s investment fund industry is on ​the verge of ‌an aggressive expansion, with total onshore and offshore assets ​under management (AUM) expected ​to surge to T$30 trillion ($968 ⁠billion) within the ​next three years, the ​chairman of Taiwan's investment fund industry association said in a ​recent interview.】

item.title: 三星显示首席执行官警告中东冲突将推高成本，媒体报道称
item.description: 三星显示公司首席执行官周四表示，中东战争可能推高手机及其他电子设备所用平板显示屏所需的能源和原材料成本，媒体报道称。【原文：Samsung ​Display's chief ‌executive said on Thursday ​the ​war in the ⁠Middle ​East threatens ​to drive up costs of ​energy ​and raw materials ‌needed ⁠for the flat screens ​used ​in ⁠mobile phones and ​other ​electronic ⁠devices, media reported.】

item.title: 美元徘徊于2026年高点附近，油价上涨推动市场押注央行将采取鹰派政策
item.description: 周四，避险美元汇率徘徊在年内高位附近，因油价攀升可能推高通胀，迫使全球央行采取更强硬的政策立场。【原文：The safe-haven U.S. dollar hovered close to its strongest levels this year on Thursday as climbing oil prices threatened to spur inflation ​and force central banks globally to adopt more hawkish policy stances.】

item.title: 《宝可梦：隐形》的热销助推任天堂Switch 2势头看涨
item.description: 任天堂周四表示，自发售以来四天内，《宝可梦 梦工厂》销量已突破220万份。该游戏的热销势头缓解了市场对Switch 2销售动能的担忧。【原文：Nintendo said on Thursday it has sold more than 2.2 ​million copies of "Pokemon Pokopia" in ‌the four days since launch as the game's popularity helps offset fear about Switch ​2 sales momentum.】

item.title: 中东战火蔓延，伊拉克水域油轮遭袭，油价应声上涨
item.description: 周四油价攀升，此前伊拉克安全官员称，伊朗装载爆炸物的船只袭击了两艘燃料油油轮，而美以对伊朗的战争也导致全球供应中断。【原文：Oil prices climbed on Thursday after Iraqi security officials said Iranian explosive-laden boats had hit two fuel oil ​tankers amid other global supply disruptions from the U.S.-Israeli war on ‌Iran.】

item.title: 日产、优步、Wayve宣布建立自动驾驶出租车合作
item.description: 日产汽车、优步科技和英国初创企业Wayve周四宣布，将合作开发无人驾驶出租车。【原文：Nissan Motor , Uber ​Technologies and ‌British startup Wayve said on ​Thursday they ​will collaborate on ⁠the development ​of robotaxis.】

item.title: 股价暴跌，油价再度飙升，伊朗袭击海湾航运
item.description: 周四亚洲股市下跌，因有报道称霍尔木兹海峡和伊拉克水域又有船只遭袭，油价因此飙升，推高了全球通胀压力并推升借贷成本。【原文：Shares fell in ​Asia on Thursday as oil prices jumped on reports that more ships had been struck in the Strait of Hormuz and ‌in Iraqi waters, fuelling inflation and pushing borrowing costs higher worldwide.】
